spec_match.rationale: Perfect compliance. The page uses real video elements with looped silent video streams, styling background colors and state badges purely via genuine :playing and :paused and :muted pseudo-classes and CSS ::before selectors.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive. Play, pause, and mute actions trigger real native video state updates which are captured seamlessly by the styling layer.

blurb_alignment.rationale: 100% aligned with the description of state-driven layouts.

edge_cases.rationale: Uses real native volumechange, timeupdate, and playsinline bindings to ensure flawless media loops.

references.rationale: Includes the mandatory ChromeStatus reference link (https://chromestatus.com/feature/5068277495758848) in the see also section.

design_system.rationale: Clean grid layout that fits the platform showcase design guidelines perfectly.

summary: An exceptional, conformant concept page demonstrating standard CSS media pseudo-classes. JS is restricted purely to playing, pausing, and muting real media streams, while CSS controls all visual styles, backgrounds, and badge contents natively.
